A breach of the Monthly Gamma Flip at 722 is required to establish a true bullish trend.

market_regime.interpretation: Call walls are solid resistance. Put walls are solid support. Gamma flip acts as a pivot point. Expect mean reversion.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected due to positive GEX
outlook.summary: Positive total GEX indicates dealers are long gamma, suppressing volatility. Reverse smirk skew and low volume PCR suggest bullish momentum. Expect price pinning between 26700 and 26900.

levels.motivazione: Massive Call volume in 0DTE (2475) and Monthly (3879) creates a strong dealer defense level just below spot.
Significant Call OI in Monthly (463) and massive 0DTE volume (1650) establish immediate resistance.
Call OI Resonance across 0DTE (165), WEEKLY (84), and MONTHLY (87) provides a robust support floor.
Call OI Resonance in all expiries, dominated by Monthly (533), creates a major upside cap.
Dominant Monthly Call OI (1175) acts as a strong structural magnet and institutional support.
Significant Put OI in 0DTE (130) and Weekly (28) creates a solid structural floor.
